_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_34_note: Session 34 (2026-05-29): NVDA deep session (pre-Computex; June 1 keynote 3 days out). Key findings: (1) Jensen Huang confirmed Vera Rubin is 'biggest product ramp in computer history' (Digitimes May 24) — CoWoS is the binding constraint; TSMC scaling 35K→140K WPM, NVDA pre-committed >50%; (2) NVIDIA $200B CPU TAM explicitly includes China — aspirational framing, zero China revenue near-term; (3) Price corrections: ALAB confirmed close $349.08 (session 33 carried $353.86 intraday); ANET confirmed close ~$154.50 (session 33 carried May 27's $158.01; May 28 saw -2.2%); (4) MU Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24 (not ~June 25); (5) Arista named Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader 2026. No DCF run (NVDA last run May 21, 8 days). next_deep_session = MRVL (June 2 Computex keynote with Jensen Huang is the priority catalyst for next session).

event_queue.event: Computex June 1 GTC Taipei keynote 11am Taipei (10pm Manila) — STILL PENDING. Session 34 pre-keynote update complete (Vera Rubin 'biggest product ramp in history' + $200B CPU TAM China comment). Session 35 ABSOLUTE PRIORITY: capture full keynote — N1X ARM chip official specs + OEM pricing, Vera Rubin NVL72 official production volume guidance, Dynamo 1.0 GA, Jensen surprise product reveal, any supply chain update. MediaTek removed from stage; full solo NVIDIA keynote.

Computex June 2 joint keynote: Matt Murphy + Jensen Huang (10:30am Taipei, Nangang Exhibition Center) — 'The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity.' NVLink Fusion showcase. Session 35/36: capture keynote outcome, update MRVL entity. Watch for Google TPU/Amazon MPU volume numbers.

Computex June 3 press conference + Scorpio X 320-lane live demo (10-11am Taipei, TaiNEX 1 Room 303). Price confirmed at $349.08 close May 28 (not $353.86 — session 33 carried intraday). Session 35/36: capture demo outcome and any hyperscaler design win announcements.
Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued for post-earnings session. Prior DCF: IV $442.63, MoS -52.3%, SELL/AVOID (May 26). No deep session before June 24.

_event_queue_note: Session 34: NVDA pre-keynote update complete; June 1 keynote still pending. Next sessions: NVDA post-keynote (June 1) → MRVL June 2 keynote → ALAB June 3 demo. MU earnings June 24 is the longer-horizon priority.
